existing_site.content: Communal Market — cafe, bakery and restaurant at 949 Glen Huntly Rd, Caulfield VIC 3162. Perfect 5-star Google rating with 118 reviews. Open Mon–Fri 6:30am–2pm, Sat 8am–2pm, Sun 8am–12:30pm. Known for exceptional coffee, cinnamon scrolls with cream cheese frosting, cookies, pastries, and light food. Warm, bright and welcoming atmosphere. Community hub in Caulfield.

brief_context.tone: warm, community, artisan — neighbourhood cafe that knows your name
brief_context.target_audience: Caulfield locals, coffee lovers, weekend brunch crowd

brief_context.tone: warm, artisan, community — neighbourhood cafe that makes people feel at home
brief_context.mood: light, warm, inviting — cream, warm white, soft tan tones. Not corporate. Human.

_reviews.author: Julia Gomes Ribeiro
_reviews.text: This has become my favourite coffee spot in the area! The coffee is incredible, the cookie is delicious, and don't even get me started on the cinnamon scroll — absolutely divine.

_reviews.author: Mike G
_reviews.text: A bright and welcoming cafe. The coffee is amazing and definitely worth a visit for this alone. Additionally they make lovely pastries and food.

_reviews.author: Steven Jeconiah
_reviews.text: It's easy to see why this spot has a five-star rating. The cinnamon scroll topped with cream cheese frosting is next level.
